items.problem: TestReconcilerConfigSurfaceDocumented uses strings.Contains for persona:/debate:/verify:/executor:, matching those tokens in prose as readily as in a real yaml block

TestDocsIndexCoversEveryDoc link regex treats a titled markdown link `](x.md "title")` as target `x.md "title"`, which fails the .md suffix check and would false-fail if a future index link adds a title
TestArchitectureDocDescribesReconciler comment claims a fictional-architecture stub would fail, but it only checks 8 substrings exist anywhere, so a buzzword-sprinkled stub passes
Fenced-block state toggles on any line starting with ``` or ~~~, so a code example containing a line like echo "```" incorrectly closes the fence and exposes subsequent prose to command parsing
Fence toggle uses inFence=!inFence without tracking info-strings or handling unbalanced fences, leaving state true for EOF and parsing prose as commands
